name: TextBox 8
text:
Problem Statement
Current interactive systems struggle to model physical movement reliably across heterogeneous sensors.
Vision-only and isolated wearable approaches lack synchronized, standardized signals.
This limits accurate analysis of posture, load symmetry, and physical exertion.
textPreview: Problem Statement | Current interactive systems struggle to model physical movement reliably across heterogeneous sensors. | Vision-only ...

name: TextBox 1
text:
Methodology & Tech Stack
Camera + YOLO: Body-pose estimation and object detection.
ESP32 + IMU: Precise motion, orientation, and stability telemetry.
Garmin Venu 3: Real-time heart-rate and physiological context.
Pipeline: Synchronizes and exports normalized JSON/JSONL features.
textPreview: Methodology & Tech Stack | Camera + YOLO: Body-pose estimation and object detection. | ESP32 + IMU: Precise motion, orientation, and stab...

name: TextBox 4
text:
Expected Outcomes & Impact
Produces reusable signals for arm extension, range, symmetry, and exertion.
Provides consistent, frame-level data for rigorous HCI evaluation.
Establishes a middleware foundation for adaptive, assistive, and rehabilitation systems.
